arts.ttl: Coventry v QPR line-ups: Colback starts for Rangers
arts.sum: Jack Colback starts for QPR in tonight’s game, while Michael Frey leads the attack. It means Kieran Morgan and Alfie Lloyd must settle for places on the bench. QPR: Nardi; Dunne, Cook, Edwards, Paal; Colback, Field; Smyth, Chair, Saito; Frey. : Subs: Walsh, Fox, Ashby, Morrison, Madsen, Morgan, Varane, Lloyd, Min-Hyeok. Coventry: to follow. arts.ttl: Huge claim made as Mark Robins told he took Coventry City as far as he could
arts.sum: Mark Robins has been hailed as Coventry City’s best manager since club legend Jimmy Hill - but told he had probably taken the Sky Blues as far as he could. As for Lampard, Strachan believes Robins’ record with Coventry means all the Chelsea legend can do at the CBS Arena to make his mark is take the club back to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Sporting director claims Coventry City’s demands stopped club from signing player
arts.sum: Viktor Gyökeres spent over two seasons at Coventry City before leaving them for Sporting in July 2023. The Championship side initially took the striker on loan from Brighton & Hove Albion in January 2021 and made his stay permanent later that year. arts.ttl: Costa Rican says QPR rejection opened door to join Derby County – Initially heading elsewhere
arts.sum: Paulo Wanchope has told Spanish newspaper AS that he approached Queens Park Rangers before joining Derby County. The Costa Rican first arrived in Europe when Derby County signed him in 1997 when they were in the Premier League. At that time, QPR were in the second division. arts.ttl: Ex-Coventry City captain set to swap play-off push for relegation battle after permission granted
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. “Blackburn Rovers can confirm that head coach John Eustace has requested permission to speak with another Championship club, following the activation of a clause in his contract,” said Rovers in a statement.

arts.ttl: Predicted Coventry City team - Frank Lampard's key change to exert control over QPR - Andy Turner - CoventryLive
arts.sum: Predicted City team v QPR: Oliver Dovin; Joel Latibeaudiere, Bobby Thomas, Liam Kitching; Milan van Ewijk, Victor Torp, Matt Grimes, Jack Rudoni, Jay Dasilva; Brandon Thomas-Asante, Ellis Simms. Expect Milan van Ewijk to return at right wing-back in place of Joel Latibeaudiere after being rested due to fatigue against the Tractor Boys, while an adductor injury to Jake Bidwell means Jay Dasilva is expected to continue at left wing-back, although Jack Burroughs is an option.
